title: We Trained AI on Stolen Work... And I'm More Creative Than Ever | Vancouver AI Meetup March 2026
fulltitle: We Trained AI on Stolen Work... And I'm More Creative Than Ever | Vancouver AI Meetup March 2026
description:
Let's be real: the AI conversation is exhausted.
On one side, you've got the boosters who act like AI will solve all our problems overnight, trained on stolen work they don't want to talk about. On the other, the doomers who think we're all doomed and refuse to engage with any of the actual possibilities.
Both sides are lazy. Both sides miss the point.
Kris Krüg isn't here to pick a team. He's here to hold two truths at once: AI has been stolen, trained on the stolen work of all mankind, full of misogyny, homophobia, racism, transphobia, and environmental devastation. AND — he's more creative, powerful, productive, and curious than he's ever been in his whole life.
That's "Both Hands Full." That's the actual work.
Recorded live at the Vancouver AI March 2026 meetup, this talk is about finding the middle path: to steward intelligence with integrity while exploring what's actually possible. No cheerleading. No doom-scrolling. Just honest, rigorous engagement with the most important technology of our time.
—
